title: A Certain Smile
writer: Frances Goodrich, Albert Hackett, Françoise Sagan
actors: Rossano Brazzi, Joan Fontaine, Bradford Dillman
plot: Dominique, a law student at the Sorbonne, is engaged to a fellow classmate. Unfortunately, she's more attracted to his philandering Uncle Luc, who's married to the charming Françoise. Dominique and Luc begin a tawdry affair.
